subject: Toucannon, a large toucan-like Pokemon with a colorful beak, perched in a lush setting
description: A large toucan-like Pokemon stands prominently in the foreground. Its most distinctive feature is an oversized, multi-colored beak banded in yellow, red, and dark tones. The body is primarily dark with a white chest patch. It stands on a branch or ledge surrounded by soft green and teal foliage. The background is a hazy, warm-toned sky blending into the lush vegetation, giving a tropical garden or jungle-edge atmosphere. The bird is oriented forward-left and appears calm and settled.
foreground: large toucan-like bird with multi-colored banded beak and dark plumage
